activation.method: subagent router judged 15 realistic user messages against the SKILL.md description
activation.notes: 10 in-scope (IEM/HP/TWS eval, DAC素质/drivability, screenshot, no-measurement, conflict, dedup, marketing, style-split) -> activate; buying-rec/EQ/speaker -> reject; fictional model + snake-oil DAC -> activate (handled at runtime).

behavioral.method: subagent executed synthesis+self-verify on two prepared cases; outputs independently re-validated with scripts/validate_output.py

checks: bilingual literary does not exceed facts
'warmer/analog' review logged as unsupported subjective (confidence 0.1) with dissent note

longform_v0_2.method: subagent acted as the skill and generated a ~4000字 长文 from a rich V-shape TWS evidence set; independently re-checked with check_longform.py --backing and audited by an adversarial over-claim judge

generation.backing_gate: PASS (check_longform exit 0; backing evaluation.json passes validate_output)

over_claim_judge.finding: prose twice described consensus-only soundstage/resolution as 测量背书/measurement-backed (provenance inflation)
held_well: preserved the treble-splashiness conflict as flagged dissent
over_claim_judge.action: hardened rules/technicalities-from-reviews.md + rules/longform-review.md with a 'no provenance inflation' guardrail; canonical fixture verified clean

depth_v0_3.method: fed a band-neutral peaky_iem analysis (signature 均衡, tilt even) that hides an 8127Hz +4.9dB sibilance feature to a subagent writing the 风格/三频 section
depth_v0_3.result: the subagent surfaced the 8kHz 齿音 peak as the headline character and explicitly noted that stopping at '中性顺滑' would miss the device's real character — confirms the peak/dip + tilt depth reaches the written result, not just the engine JSON
depth_v0_3.engine_upgrades: fr_analyze features[] (peak/dip + perceptual hint) + continuous tilt; compare.py deterministic deltas; targets.json validated vs authoritative raw curves (treble bands corrected ~+7dB)

rig_target_v0_4.method: fed a 5128-measured IEM (infer_target -> JM-1) plus its per-band deltas vs vince_iem_ref to a subagent writing the 目标定位/个人参考对比 section
rig_target_v0_4.result: subagent correctly (1) stated 5128 measurement + JM-1 neutral-DF tuning intent (no bass shelf), (2) read the device as bass-light (~5-7dB less sub/mid-bass) and slightly brighter (+2dB treble) vs Vince's personal reference, (3) framed as taste-fit not absolute good/bad, and (4) never mixed in a 711 target — rig discipline held
rig_target_v0_4.engine_upgrades: rig-tagged targets (711/GRAS/5128) incl. JM-1, 5128 DF/FF, OE2013, vince_iem_ref; infer_target.py ranks same-rig targets by RMS fit

deterministic_regression: evals/run_all.py GREEN (L0 schema + L1 golden incl. peaky + determinism + output gate + long-form + compare + target inference + token budget)
limitations: JM-1 / 5128-FF exact band dB are reconstructed (med/low conf); vince_iem_ref bass-shelf shape pending Vince's confirmation; agent-level pass@k / cost / paired lift remain future work.
